title: 7th Computer Olympiad
text: Home * Tournaments * Computer Olympiad * 7th Computer Olympiad < Prev Next > Maastricht University [1] The Seventh Computer Olympiad took place from July 5 to 11, 2002 , at Maastricht University , Maastricht , The Netherlands , in conjunction with the Tenth World Computer Chess Championship . The Olympiad as well the WCCC were held in the former residence of the Gouvernor of Limburg in the historic center of Maastricht, Bouillonstraat 1-3, which now belongs to the Maastricht University . During the 7th Computer Olympiad the workshop on computer games was held, again organized by Jos Uiterwijk .
